title: Gluten-Free Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy gluten-free stir fry made with a tangy sauce and served with creamy rice. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the protein of choice and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the stir-fry sauce and soy sauce (if using) and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve the stir-fry over creamy cooked rice.
Garnish with green onions and sesame seeds (optional).
